series_metadata.series_title: PLE Student Course Completion Certificates - Prior to 12/2006
series_metadata.series_description: Forms submitted to track and verify pre-licensing education student course complation up to 12/2006.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 4 years, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 4 years, then destroy., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Erase
